app_description: Companion app for HomeyAutomotive — relays the OAuth2 authentication flow.
auth_session_not_found: Authentication session not found or expired.
auth_session_expired: Authentication session has expired. Please try again.
auth_pending: Authentication pending — waiting for user to authorize.
error_internal: An internal error occurred. Please try again.
error_token_exchange: Failed to exchange authorization code for access token.

menu.home_config_desc: Choose which lights and locks to show in your car's Home screen.

home_config.title: Home Tab Devices
home_config.subtitle: Select up to 9 devices. If none are selected your Favorite devices will be shown.
home_config.max_reached: You have reached the maximum limit of 9 devices.
